title: fetch_session double-strips trailing slash silently
description: client.rs line 44 stores base_url with the trailing slash already stripped. Line 67 inside fetch_session calls trim_end_matches('/') again on the already-stripped value. The second strip is always a no-op but is silent — a maintainer who changes one side of this invariant will not notice the other. Add an inline comment on line 67 explaining it is a defensive guard (in case the constructor changes), or centralize the strip into a helper and document the invariant once.
